problem id: 8ac52d78
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) AND SHL(4)

examples:
  00010110 -> 01000000
  00000010 -> 00000000
  01110011 -> 00100000
  00111011 -> 00100000
  11010101 -> 00010000
  10011110 -> 11000000
  10101101 -> 10010000
  11101101 -> 10010000

query: 11100001
predicted answer: 00010000
